home.seoTitle: Verified creator PCs and gaming setups
home.seoDescription: A source-first database of PCs, peripherals and streaming equipment used by creators, streamers and esports players.
home.description: PCs, peripherals and streaming gear grouped by dated public sources. No invented specs or silently recycled lists.
home.featuredDescription: Creator setups with public sources and review dates.
home.principlesTitle: A better way to track creator gear
home.principle1Text: Each claim keeps its publisher, check date and original link.
home.principle2Text: Old data stays labeled as old instead of receiving a cosmetic new year.
home.principle3Text: Separate systems and tournament gear are distinguished when sources allow it.
home.ctaTitle: Can you prove a setup change?
home.ctaText: A creator clip, setup tour or public product post is more useful than another copied list.

catalog.seoTitle: Creator PC and streaming setup database
catalog.seoDescription: Browse creator, streamer and esports setups grouped by public source and information date.
catalog.title: Find their setup
catalog.description: Search published creator setups with sources and dates.
catalog.noResultsText: Try a nickname, real name or a broader filter.

profile.equipmentDescription: Each group shows its source, information date and related details. Home, bootcamp and tournament equipment may differ.
profile.noEquipmentText: No component list has been added to this profile.
profile.faqPcAnswerKnown: The available configuration is listed above by source, together with the source date and notes.
profile.faqPcAnswerUnknown: No component list is available for this profile.
profile.faqFreshAnswer: The page review date and the original source date are shown separately. A new page date never hides an older source.
profile.faqBuyQuestion: Can I build the same PC?
profile.faqBuyAnswer: You can use the listed parts as a reference, but compatibility, availability and price should be checked before buying.

methodology.seoDescription: Our source hierarchy, update policy, corrections process and affiliate rules for creator PC and setup profiles.
methodology.title: Evidence before equipment
methodology.description: A page is useful only when readers can tell what is known, who reported it and when it may have changed.
methodology.sourceIntro: We prefer sources in this order and always show which one contains each equipment item.
methodology.tier1Text: A creator setup tour, public post, channel description or direct statement showing the exact model.
methodology.tier2Text: A clear stream frame, event photo or manufacturer partnership where the product can be identified.
methodology.tier3Text: A specialist database or editorial article with a visible update date.
methodology.tier4Text: Forums, copied lists and AI summaries may provide leads, but are not published as equipment facts.
methodology.datesText: Every page separates our review date from the source's own date. Updating layout or copy does not reset the evidence clock. Profiles are reviewed after public setup tours, hardware sponsorships and major team changes.
methodology.seoText: Every published creator profile is indexable and included in the sitemap. Search and filter parameters remain noindex to avoid duplicate pages.
methodology.moneyText: An affiliate relationship may change where a buying link points, but never which item is listed. Alternatives and recommendations remain separate from the creator's equipment.
methodology.correctionsText: When a newer or clearer source contradicts a listing, the profile is updated. Sources are not silently removed merely because they became inconvenient.

footer.description: Creator PCs and gear, documented with sources and dates.
footer.legal: SetupIndex is an independent reference project and is not affiliated with the creators or brands listed.

error.title404: This setup is off the desk
error.text404: The page may have moved, or this creator has not been added yet.
error.textDefault: Please return to the directory and try again.
